message: native: 5 element-wise shaders ported byte-equal (rms_norm, zero_f32, cast×2, add_fp16)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
+{
+  "shader": "add_fp16",
+  "uniform": {
+    "binding": 0,
+    "byteLength": 16
+  },
+  "extraUniforms": [],
+  "inputs": [
+    {
+      "binding": 1,
+      "name": "a",
+      "byteLength": 512
+    },
+    {
+      "binding": 2,
+      "name": "b",
+      "byteLength": 512
+    }
+  ],
+  "output": {
+    "binding": 3,
+    "dtype": "f16",
+    "byteLength": 512,
+    "hasInitial": false
+  },
+  "dispatch": [
+    4,
+    1,
+    1
+  ]
+}
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -0,0 +1,32 @@
+{
+  "shader": "cast_f32_to_fp16_scaled",
+  "uniform": {
+    "binding": 0,
+    "byteLength": 16
+  },
+  "extraUniforms": [
+    {
+      "binding": 1,
+      "name": "scale",
+      "byteLength": 16
+    }
+  ],
+  "inputs": [
+    {
+      "binding": 2,
+      "name": "src",
+      "byteLength": 1024
+    }
+  ],
+  "output": {
+    "binding": 3,
+    "dtype": "f16",
+    "byteLength": 512,
+    "hasInitial": false
+  },
+  "dispatch": [
+    4,
+    1,
+    1
+  ]
+}
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+{
+  "shader": "cast_fp16_to_f32",
+  "uniform": {
+    "binding": 0,
+    "byteLength": 16
+  },
+  "extraUniforms": [],
+  "inputs": [
+    {
+      "binding": 1,
+      "name": "src",
+      "byteLength": 512
+    }
+  ],
+  "output": {
+    "binding": 2,
+    "dtype": "f32",
+    "byteLength": 1024,
+    "hasInitial": false
+  },
+  "dispatch": [
+    4,
+    1,
+    1
+  ]
+}
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+{
+  "shader": "zero_f32",
+  "uniform": {
+    "binding": 0,
+    "byteLength": 16
+  },
+  "extraUniforms": [],
+  "inputs": [],
+  "output": {
+    "binding": 1,
+    "dtype": "u32",
+    "byteLength": 1024,
+    "hasInitial": true
+  },
+  "dispatch": [
+    4,
+    1,
+    1
+  ]
+}
